title: USGS Flood Inundation Mapping Extension
description: A prototype extension schema for STAC Items and Collections meant to catalog USGS Flood Inundation Mapping (FIM) data created using HEC-RAS hydraulic models.

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: For USGS-FIM, the geometry will be obtained from the domain shapefile.

usgs-fim:huc8.title: HUC8
usgs-fim:huc8.description: Specifies the HUC8 where the modeling is done.

usgs-fim:gauge.title: Gauge ID
usgs-fim:gauge.description: The NWS gauge ID. This is a 4 letter plus 1 number sequence. A single HUC8 can have multiple USGS-FIM studies since a study can be conducted using data from multiple gauges within the HUC8.

usgs-fim:magnitude.title: Event Magnitudes
usgs-fim:magnitude.description: These are the event magnitudes present in the study. For USGS-FIM data, event magnitudes are framed as: minor, moderate, major, action. For each event magnitude, the asset ID of the raster asset(s) associated with the magnitude are listed.

usgs-fim:attributes.title: Attributes
usgs-fim:attributes.description: A dictionary containing the values, the raster categories they map to, and the standard color mapping of the values if available. This is obtained from the TIFF .vat file or the TIFF header if present.

usgs-fim:flowfile.title: Flow File
usgs-fim:flowfile.description: This is an object adapted from the tables extension 'tables:columns' object that explicitly lists the flow-file asset IDs for the magnitudes present in the study and describes the different columns present in each flowfile.

usgs-fim:rating-curve.title: Rating Curve
usgs-fim:rating-curve.description: This is an object adapted from the tables extension 'tables:columns' object that explicitly lists the rating curve asset IDs and describes the different columns present in the rating curve asset file.
